fields.label: Agent Profile
fields.description: The agent profile this credential is scoped to.

fields.label: Skill
fields.description: The skill this credential authorises. The dispatcher injects this credential as FRIDAY_CREDS_<row-name> into the sandbox env only when this skill runs.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Only enabled rows are returned by resolve_credentials(). Disable to revoke a credential without deleting it.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Optional admin note describing what this credential is for (e.g. 'Stripe production key', 'SendGrid dev account').

fields.label: Username
fields.description: Username for services that need basic auth. Injected as FRIDAY_CREDS_<row-name>_USER.

fields.label: Password
fields.description: Password for services that need basic auth. Encrypted at rest. (Read by sandbox helpers; not selected by the current resolve_credentials() SQL — see sandbox/credentials.py.)

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Service API key. Injected as FRIDAY_CREDS_<row-name>_KEY into the sandbox env. Encrypted at rest.

fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Primary bearer token for the service. Injected as FRIDAY_CREDS_<row-name> into the sandbox env. Encrypted at rest.
